step_rationale: Inhibits VSMC proliferation; modulates fibrous-cap stability and plaque remodeling.
mechanism: miR-379 suppresses vascular smooth muscle cell proliferation, influencing fibrous-cap integrity and atherosclerotic plaque stability.

references.title: Circulating miR-379 as a potential novel biomarker for diagnosis of acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: European review for medical and pharmacological sciences
